assertions.text: Pulls all 4 Slack channels including presales-o4aa-a4aa-champions
assertions.evidence: With-skill report lists all 4 channels. Without-skill only pulled 3.

assertions.text: Only updates files in the se-playbook section (9 files), not other sections
assertions.evidence: Both runs scoped correctly to 9 se-playbook files.

assertions.text: Output contains structured report: Files Updated, Files Skipped, Topics Needing Deeper Research
assertions.evidence: With-skill output has all 3 sections. Without-skill has partial structure.
Both runs included source attribution on all changes.

assertions.text: Does not re-add content already present from earlier update run (avoids duplicates)
assertions.evidence: With-skill skipped 8/9 files correctly. Without-skill made 6 changes, most of which overlap with earlier updates.

assertions.text: Includes Confluence pull in addition to Slack
assertions.evidence: With-skill checked Confluence (15 pages, none field-relevant). Without-skill skipped Confluence.
